title: nie-bot: payment auto-responder stub
description:
What: When config.auto_payment_address=true and a PaymentAction::Request arrives, send back a stub PaymentAction::Address response (Phase 4f: no real wallet, use testnet placeholder address).

Algorithm:
1. In bot/src/payment.rs:
   pub async fn maybe_auto_respond(
       event: &BotEvent,
       config: &ResolvedBotConfig,
       relay_tx: &mpsc::Sender<JsonRpcRequest>,
   ) -> Result<()>
   - If BotEvent::PaymentRequest AND config.auto_payment_address:
     a. construct stub address: format!("STUB_TESTNET_ADDRESS_FOR_SESSION_{}", session_id)
     b. build ClearMessage::Payment { session_id, action: PaymentAction::Address { chain, address } }
     c. serialize to bytes; build WhisperParams { to: from, payload }; send via relay_tx
   - If NOT PaymentRequest or NOT auto_payment_address: return Ok(()) immediately

Defensive:
- DOCUMENT clearly: stub address is not a real Zcash address; real wallet integration is Phase 2
- Never log session_id at info level (it correlates payments to users)
- WhisperParams to field is the original sender's pub_id (from the PaymentRequest)

Agent team: I (implementer). V (validator).
Tests: unit test in payment.rs: auto_payment_address=false → no message sent; auto_payment_address=true with PaymentRequest → WhisperParams sent on relay_tx
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-bot clean; payment.rs documents stub clearly; tests for enabled/disabled auto-respond pass
